'''âd-p-p''' ('''kadapap''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:zump|zump]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-p-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zump|zump]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âd-p-p
|-
! Lemma
| kadapap
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thidapap|thidapap]] || [[word:jidapap|jidapap]] || [[word:shidapap|shidapap]] || [[word:kidapap|kidapap]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthudapap|thuthudapap]] || [[word:jujudapap|jujudapap]] || [[word:shushudapap|shushudapap]] || [[word:kukudapap|kukudapap]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thudapap|thudapap]] || [[word:judapap|judapap]] || [[word:shudapap|shudapap]] || [[word:kudapap|kudapap]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thudapap|thudapap]] || [[word:judapap|judapap]] || [[word:shudapap|shudapap]] || [[word:kudapap|kudapap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thedapap|thedapap]] || [[word:jedapap|jedapap]] || [[word:shedapap|shedapap]] || [[word:kedapap|kedapap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothodapap|thothodapap]] || [[word:jojodapap|jojodapap]] || [[word:shoshodapap|shoshodapap]] || [[word:kokodapap|kokodapap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thodapap|thodapap]] || [[word:jodapap|jodapap]] || [[word:shodapap|shodapap]] || [[word:kodapap|kodapap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thodapap|thodapap]] || [[word:jodapap|jodapap]] || [[word:shodapap|shodapap]] || [[word:kodapap|kodapap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠdapap|thĂŠdapap]] || [[word:jĂŠdapap|jĂŠdapap]] || [[word:shĂŠdapap|shĂŠdapap]] || [[word:kĂŠdapap|kĂŠdapap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathadapap|thathadapap]] || [[word:jajadapap|jajadapap]] || [[word:shashadapap|shashadapap]] || [[word:kakadapap|kakadapap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thadapap|thadapap]] || [[word:jadapap|jadapap]] || [[word:shadapap|shadapap]] || [[word:kadapap|kadapap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thadapap|thadapap]] || [[word:jadapap|jadapap]] || [[word:shadapap|shadapap]] || [[word:kadapap|kadapap]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shadapap|shadapap]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshadapap|goshadapap]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishadapap|gokishadapap]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shadapapnĂŒ|shadapapnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshadapapnknĂŒ|goshadapapnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishadapapnĂŒ|gokishadapapnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shadapapshĂ«|shadapapshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshadapapnkshĂ«|goshadapapnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishadapapshĂ«|gokishadapapshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadapapro|shadapapro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadapapnkro|goshadapapnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadapapro|gokishadapapro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shadapapmu|shadapapmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadapapnkmu|goshadapapnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadapapmu|gokishadapapmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shadapapsher|shadapapsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshadapapnksher|goshadapapnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishadapapsher|gokishadapapsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shadapapng|shadapapng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshadapapnkng|goshadapapnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishadapapng|gokishadapapng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shadapapya|shadapapya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshadapapnkya|goshadapapnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishadapapya|gokishadapapya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shadapapyam|shadapapyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshadapapnkyam|goshadapapnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishadapapyam|gokishadapapyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadapapnĂŒshĂ«|shadapapnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadapapnknĂŒshĂ«|goshadapapnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadapapnĂŒshĂ«|gokishadapapnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadapapnĂŒro|shadapapnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadapapnknĂŒro|goshadapapnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadapapnĂŒro|gokishadapapnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadapapnĂŒmu|shadapapnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadapapnknĂŒmu|goshadapapnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadapapnĂŒmu|gokishadapapnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadapapshĂ«nĂŒ|shadapapshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadapapnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshadapapnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadapapshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishadapapshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadapapshĂ«ro|shadapapshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadapapnkshĂ«ro|goshadapapnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadapapshĂ«ro|gokishadapapshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadapapshĂ«mu|shadapapshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadapapnkshĂ«mu|goshadapapnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadapapshĂ«mu|gokishadapapshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadapapronĂŒ|shadapapronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadapapnkronĂŒ|goshadapapnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadapapronĂŒ|gokishadapapronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadapaproshĂ«|shadapaproshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadapapnkroshĂ«|goshadapapnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadapaproshĂ«|gokishadapaproshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadapapromu|shadapapromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadapapnkromu|goshadapapnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadapapromu|gokishadapapromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadapapmunĂŒ|shadapapmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadapapnkmunĂŒ|goshadapapnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadapapmunĂŒ|gokishadapapmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadapapmushĂ«|shadapapmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadapapnkmushĂ«|goshadapapnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadapapmushĂ«|gokishadapapmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadapapmuro|shadapapmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadapapnkmuro|goshadapapnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadapapmuro|gokishadapapmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4a6dc77}}
